text: While you control an Imperial character, each character attacking one of your provinces gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political].
flavorText: "A Scorpion on the throne, even with an edict behind him, cannot be trusted." - Asako Togama
name: The Scorpion Clan Coup

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose an attacking character - remove 2 fate from that character.
name: Brushfires

text: Covert. Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, spend 1 fate. Choose a character with 1 or more fate on it - move that character to the conflict.
flavorText: "Take this as a symbol of our goodwill."
name: Yasuki Oguri

text: Limit 1 per deck. Each character attacking a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political] for each fate on that character. Forced Interrupt: When this holding's province is broken - you lose 2 fate.
name: Watchtower of Sun's Shadow

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, each player chooses a character controlled by one of their opponents - each player moves 1 fate from their fate pool to the character they chose.
flavorText: Each gift forms the foundation of future favor.
name: Diplomatic Gift-Giver

text: Sincerity. Reaction: After you look at 1 or more cards in an opponent's hand (or those are revealed) - draw 2 cards, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of your conflict deck.
name: Keen Warrior

text: Action: Return a ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a status token on a character - discard it.
flavorText: "Only one who relinquishes fear is truly free." - Tao of Shinsei
name: Overlooked Community

text: This character cannot receive dishonored status tokens. Action: If you have gained 2 or more honor this phase - gain 1 fate.
name: Revered Ikoma

text: Action: Choose an opponent's province. That opponent selects one - either discard each card in that province, or you gain 2 honor.
flavorText: The interruption was unorthodox, but none present could gainsay her.
name: Procedural Interference

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character with no fate on it - bow that character. If that character is a [clan-phoenix] character, also dishonor it.
flavorText: "We can only relate to pain that is our own."
name: Asako Maezawa

text: Keeper role only. Reaction: After an opponent gains 1 or more honor - that player loses 1 honor.
flavorText: "Do you truly wish for open war between our clans?"
name: Sinister Peacekeeper

text: Dire - While this character is participating in a conflict, reduce the cost to play each card in your hand by 1 (to a minimum of 0).(This character is dire when it has no fate on it.) Reaction: After this character enters play - draw 2 cards.
name: Khanbulak Benefactor

text: Attach to a unique [clan-crab] character. Ancestral. Restricted. If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating character - that character's controller moves all fate from it to their fate pool, then sacrifices it."
name: Chikara

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player - search the top X cards of your dynasty deck for a character with printed cost X or lower and put it into play, where X is the amount of skill by which you won.
name: Guardians of Rokugan

text: Action: During a conflict - abilities on characters cannot be triggered this conflict.
flavorText: His gentle courtesy eased the hearts of his guests, until they found themselves unwilling to confront him over his vassal's undue aggression.
name: Exemplary Etiquette

text: Action: During a conflict - characters without fate do not count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.
flavorText: "Doji Kayo-san, you are not dismissed. Our tea is not yet finished."
name: Superior Authority

text: Restricted. This attachment cannot be chosen as the target of an opponent's event. Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - resolve the effect of each ring in your claimed ring pool."
name: Self-Understanding

text: Water role only. Action: If you have gained 2 or more honor this phase, choose an opponent and 2 cards in your conflict discard pile. That opponent chooses 1 of those cards - add the chosen card to your hand and place the other on the bottom of your conflict deck.
name: Renowned Singer

text: Void role only. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel between a character your opponent controls of your choice and a character you control of your opponent's choice - resolve the duel. Remove 1 fate from the duel's loser.
name: Heresy!

text: Attach to a unique character you control. Ancestral. Restricted. Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, discard the Imperial Favor. Choose an event or attachment in your opponent's conflict discard pile – play that card without paying its fate cost."
name: Kunshu

text: Void role only. Attach to a character you control. Interrupt: When attached character leaves play – search your dynasty deck for a character with lower printed cost than attached character and put it into play. Shuffle.
name: Daughter of War

text: Seeker role only. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. Place 1 fate on the duel's winner.
name: Make Your Case
